long_description:

Plus, the non-porous nature of glass means the dish will resist stains and odours, so there is no problem alternating between sweet and savoury dishes.

  • Resistant to extreme temperatures, from -40C to +300C, and thermal shock reaching 220C

  • Large 4L capacity to fit more food

  • Made in France and comes with a 10 Year Guarantee

  • Simplistic and minimalist design for oven to table serving - Large handles for easy handling from oven to table

  • Nestable and space saving.

  • Does not absorb food odours or flavours.

description: WILTSHIRE FLEXIBLE MUFFIN PAN 6CUP
ingredients: Silicone
long_description:
Heavy-handed greasing be gone! The unbeatable non-stick surface of this muffin pan means quick and easy release of cupcakes, muffins and all other heavenly treats. A versatile little number, it's suitable for the oven, fridge, freezer and microwave.

Here's to the home loving, home baking kitchen heroes. The ones who bake with love and celebrate with food. Impress and delight with your cupcakes and muffins perfectly baked.

Cupcake cuteness and all round perfection will be a cinch to whip up with this versatile little number. It's suitable for the oven, fridge, freezer and microwave. Made from silicone to allow for even heat distribution, your muffins or cupcakes will bake perfectly and slip right out (making cleaning up extra easy). The portioned sizing is also ideal for meal planning and preparation. And it's dishwasher safe, so that's one less thing for you to do.
  • Cup size 7.5cm X 4.5cm

  • 100% food safe silicone

  • Oven safe to 220C

  • Fridge, freezer & microwave safe

  • 3 year guarantee
name: Flexible Muffin Pan 6 Cup

description: TEFAL COOK RIGHT NON STICK FRYPAN
ingredients: NA
long_description:
The new Cook Right range produces great results with none of the hassle. Discover fully-coated cookware—inside, outside, even the flameguard—for smooth and painless clean-up that couldn't be easier. The high-quality Titanium coating was built to last, while a diffusion base produces optimum heat distribution for evenly-cooked food and the handle offers enhanced ergonomics for maximum comfort. Compatible with all stovetops (except induction). This high-performance frypan puts flawless searing and fat-free cooking within reach, thanks to a high-quality non-stick surface, for healthy results with uncompromising flavor. Whether it's everyday dishes made from scratch or a weekend crowd-pleaser to satisfy the whole family, there are no shortcuts in creating mouth-watering home cooking. Tefal offers cookware to fast-track the cleaning process, giving you more time to focus on what counts.
  • EASY CLEANING: Non-stick coating inside and out plus flameguard for effortless cleaning

  • HEAT INDICATOR : THERMO-SIGNAL changes color when it's time to start cooking for perfect searing

  • TITANIUM NON-STICK COATING : The high-quality durable non-stick coating

  • TESTED SAFE NON-STICK COATING : Safe non-stick, no PFOA, no Lead, no Cadmium. (Stricter controls than those required by current food contact regulations for each new ranges. No lead no cadmium (no Pb no Cd) means no intentional addition of Pb and Cd in the coatings. No migration above detection threshold)

  • ESSENTIAL FORMAT: For easy-to-prepare recipes that are sure to please, such as omelets, burger patties and grilled chicken

  • DIFFUSION BASE: For homogeneous cooking.

  • ERGONOMIC HANDLE : To ensure added comfort while cooking.

  • MADE IN FRANCE : Designed and manufactured entirely in France.
name: Non Stick Frypan

description: TEFAL COOK RIGHT XL NON STICK SAUTEPAN
ingredients: Avoid overheating your empty pan Never heat fat or oil to the extent that it burns and turns black Do not use knives and whisks. Slight surface marks or abrasions are normal and will not affect the performance of the non-stick coating Never put cold water directly into a hot pan. Sudden changes of temperature may cause metal to warp, resulting in an uneven base.
long_description:
The Tefal Cook Right XL collection was made to meet all your daily cooking needs, bringing together long-lasting performance with generous shapes for hearty meals day in and day out. Everything you need for delicious and healthy cooking is within reach: a highly resistant non-stick coating—exceptionally durable, eco-friendly by cutting down on energy use and offering effortless, water-saving clean-up—advanced THERMO-SIGNAL technology for flawless results that take the guesswork out of cooking, and a Diffusion+ Base to ensure perfectly homogenous results. All this, with a generous XL format made to satisfy even the hungriest of families with total ease. This easy-to-use cookware adds a healthy touch to your everyday meals—grilled chicken to top the perfect Caesar salad, irresistible quesadillas, mouth-watering breakfast skillets that take brunch to a whole new level, and more—for versatile and healthy home cooking with uncompromising flavor.

At Tefal, everything we make, we've been making with care over 60 years. Since the beginning, we are guided by a constant desire to innovate and create perfectly safe and highly performant products, respecting the environment. They are guaranteed PFOA, Cadmium and Lead free and manufactured with our French expertise
  • LONG-LASTING NON-STICK COATING : High quality Titanium coating delivers excellent non-stick performance

  • TESTED SAFE NON-STICK COATING : Safe non-stick, no PFOA, no Lead, no Cadmium. (Stricter controls than those required by current food contact regulations for each new ranges. No lead no cadmium (no Pb no Cd) means no intentional addition of Pb and Cd in the coatings. No migration above detection threshold).

  • HEAT INDICATOR : THERMO-SIGNAL changes color when it's time to start cooking for perfect searing

  • DIFFUSION + BASE : For homogeneous cooking

  • IDEAL SHAPE : For reverse-seared steak, tender salmon, sauteed vegetables

  • ERGONOMIC HANDLE : To ensure added comfort while cooking.

  • HOB COMPATIBILITY : Gas, electric, ceramic.

  • ECO-FRIENDLY : Recyclable product.
name: Stick Sautepan

description: GREENLIFE NORDICS CERAMIC NON-STICK FRYPAN
ingredients: Contains recycled aluminum
long_description:
Beautiful in its simplicity, functional in the kitchen! That's the best way to describe the GreenLife Nordics collection. This pan has a high-quality aluminium body, so it heats up evenly. The natural shade of the body nicely matches the stay-cool handle with a wood effect.

 
The pan has a high-quality PFAS-free ceramic non-stick coating, which helps you fry healthier. You'll need less butter or oil, and the non-stick coating is very easy to clean. Thanks to the reinforced rim you can tap your spatula or spoon without damaging the pan.

 
Moreover, you'll enjoy a great cooking experience on any stovetop with this frying pan, thanks to its special induction base.
  • Healthy ceramic non-stick coating: free of PFAS, PFOA, lead & cadmium

  • Scandinavian look for a touch of elegance in any kitchen

  • Reinforced rim for optimal durability

  • Stay-cool handle with wooden pattern

  • All stovetops, including induction

  • Contains recycled aluminium.

  • Dishwasher safe, but most messes wipe away.

description: GREENLIFE SOFTGRIP CERAMIC NON-STICK FRYPAN
long_description:
The Soft Grip collection is all about comfort and control. Designed for effortless performance and cleanup, this range features our toxin-free Thermolon nonstick coating, which is free of PFAS, PFOA, lead, and cadmium. GreenLife's healthy ceramic nonstick is not stuck in the past—that's why our ceramic nonstick starts with sand and creates 60% less CO2 emissions during the curing phase than traditional coatings. These pans are also crafted with recycled aluminum, because we want your kids' kids to cook healthy, too. Finished in vibrant colors, this set is outfitted with stay-cool handles to keep your cooking comfortable. For all stove tops, except induction. Oven safe to 180°C. Dishwasher safe.
  • Our healthy and easy-to-clean ceramic nonstick coating is derived from sand and free of PFAS, PFOA, lead, and cadmium for effortless cooking and quick cleanup
  • Diamond reinforced coating
  • Soft Grip Bakelite handles are designed to stay cool on the stovetop for maximum comfort
  • Made from recycled aluminum and reinforced with a wobble-free base for extra strength and even heating
  • Dishwasher safe, but most messes wipe away
  • Rivet less interior to prevent snags and food buildup
  • Oven safe to 180 C°
  • For all stovetops except induction
  • Healthy and easy-to-clean ceramic nonstick coating
  • Free of PFAS, PFOA, lead, and cadmium
  • Diamond reinforced coating
  • Bakelite handles are designed to stay cool
  • Made from recycled aluminum
  • Dishwasher safe.
  • Oven safe to 180 C.
  • Suitable on all stovetops except induction.

long_description:
Tefal's Lightest Induction Pan! Easy, fast and oh-so light! With So'Light, cooking is effortless thanks to an ultra-lightweight design and ergonomic handle. It's Tefal's lightest induction pan—up to 43% lighter*—and features our all-new Light Tech Technology, offering rapid heating on all stovetops like never before.   • Thermo-Signal technology - Enhanced Thermo-Signal technology turns full red when the pan has reached the ideal starting temperature, ensuring perfect results every time.

  • Rapid heating - Thanks to the Light Tech Technology, the pan heats up in a flash for fast cooking results. Compatible with all stovetops, including induction.

  • Ergonomic handle - The ergonomic handle with convenient thumb rest ensures easy handling, adding unmatched comfort to the cooking experience.

  • Made in France - Our innovation-driven products are made from high-quality materials and with the utmost care, promoting the excellence of French expertise..

Introducing the Wiltshire Air Fryer Liners, the perfect addition to your air frying game.  Say goodbye to messy and time-consuming clean-ups and hello to quick and easy cooking with these revolutionary air frying papers.

These papers are specially designed to fit most air fryer baskets and allow for healthier cooking by reducing the need for added oils or fats. TRAP AND NEUTRALISE The poo smells stay trapped inside the bowl where you can flush them away before they have a chance to fill the room.
BREATHE EASY Smells are stopped in their tracks while leaving a light scent behind so your stinky stuff doesn't smell at all.

description: NILODOR DEODORIZER CONCENTRATE
long_description:
Say goodbye to unpleasant odours with Nilodor Odour Neutraliser Drops ??? the ultimate solution to instantly eliminate bad smells in an average-sized room. With just a single drop, Nilodor works its magic, neutralising odours in seconds, leaving your space fresh and inviting.

Directions for Use:

It's easy to use Nilodor. Remove the cap, invert the bottle, and gently tap with your finger. Remember not to shake the bottle ??? each drop of Nilodor is highly effective. If you can smell Nilodor, you may have used too much. To achieve the fastest results, place Nilodor near incoming air currents, like window sills, doors, or air conditioning inlets.

Versatile and Effective:

Nilodor is a highly versatile odour neutraliser. You can use it on air conditioner and heater units by placing 2 or 3 drops on a cotton or paper swab and attaching it to the edge of the unit. For kitchen odours, a single drop on warm surfaces away from burners does the trick. In the laundry, 2 or 3 drops of Nilodor in the rinsing water or bleaching solution give everything a fresh, pleasant aroma.

Clean and Refreshing:

For a clean-smelling nursery, place one drop directly in the waste basket or on the floor after disposing of a soiled diaper. Nilodor is also a nurse's preferred choice for sickroom odours, as 1 or 2 drops are enough to neutralise disturbing smells that can affect patients' well-being.

Multipurpose Household Helper:

Whether you're mopping the floors or cleaning out the refrigerator, Nilodor comes to the rescue. Add 2 or 3 drops to your mop water for a fresh, airy atmosphere that lasts. When cleaning the refrigerator, dilute 2 drops in water for effective odour elimination without applying Nilodor directly inside.

Pet-Friendly Freshness:

Even your furry friends will love Nilodor! Place 1 drop of Nilodor near the spots where pet odours collect, and see the difference. You can also dilute 2 drops in y
name: Concentrated Deodoriser Odour Neutralising Eliminator Air Freshener

How Ant-Rid works: 

Ant-Rid has a unique delayed action formula with special sweet based attractant to lure foraging worker ants to the liquid. Initially, ant activity may increase but this will ease as worker ants take the liquid back to the nest passing it on, destroying the queen and nest. Ant-Rid works best indoors. However, success can be achieved outdoors by shielding Ant-Rid from sun and breeze, which can cause skin to form.

Contains insecticide to kill fleas, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, carpet beetles, moths and ants fast.
Complete do-it-yourself home protection kit.
Contains an Insect Growth Regulator (IGR) to kill flea eggs and break the breeding cycle.
The IGR remains active for 3 months to prevent fleas re-infestation.
Product Features:
- Locking tab releases the entire can contents as a fine mist that kills existing insect infestations where they hide.
- Special formulation also kills flea eggs and prevents reinfestation for up to 3 months by breaking the flea breeding cycle. Flea life cycle - 4 Stages: Eggs, Larvae, Pupae & Adults. Adults lay eggs on host and fall into carpet. Eggs hatch into Larvae (2-4 days). Larvae feed on organic debris (4-12 days). Pupae emerge as biting adults after 5-7 days. Contains an Insect Growth Regulator that breaks the life cycle so no eggs hatch and no larvae mature.
- Room can be re-entered 2 hours after treatment.
- Does not stain furnishing.
Do-It-Yourself.
Just place and set...
Kitchen, garage/shed, pet areas, bedrooms, attic/under house, caravans.
Kills cockroaches, fleas & insect infestations.
Over 90% natural ingredients - 1.1% synthetic actives.

When used against a wall or other vertical surface, snap traps should be placed perpendicular to the wall with the trigger end closer to the wall.

description: RID BITE RELIEF REPELLENT ANTISEPTIC BITE PROTECTION INSECT REPELLENT SPRAY 100ML
ingredients: ACTIVE CONSTITUENTS: 160g/L DIETHYLTOLUAMIDE 20g/L N-OCTYL BICYCLOHEPTENE DICARBOXIMIDE 1g/L TRICLOSAN
long_description:
Introducing the RID Bite Relief Repellent Pump Spray—your comprehensive solution for both preventing and soothing insect bites. This advanced formula not only repels mosquitoes, flies, and other biting insects but also provides immediate relief from the discomfort of existing bites. Enriched with chamomile and vitamin E, it helps reduce inflammation and promotes healing, ensuring your skin stays protected and calm.

Ideal For:
  • BBQs
  • Camping
  • Sports
  • Holidays
  • Children

Directions for Use:

  1. Application: Hold the bottle upright and spray all exposed skin in a sweeping motion from a distance of 15-20cm.
  2. Face Application: To apply to the face, spray onto hands first, then gently rub onto the face, avoiding eyes and mouth.
  3. Frequency: Reapply as necessary, especially after sweating, swimming, or towel drying.
Experience the dual benefits of protection and relief with RID Bite Relief Repellent Pump Spray, ensuring you and your family can enjoy the outdoors without the nuisance of insect bites.
  • Repels mosquitoes and flies for 6 hours

  • Enhanced Formula: Contains chamomile for its anti-inflammatory properties and vitamin E for skin healing.

  • Antiseptic Protection: Helps prevent infection from existing bites.

  • Long-Lasting Defense: Provides extended protection against mosquitoes, flies, ticks, fleas, biting midges, leeches, and sandflies.

  • Non-Greasy & Lightly Scented: Ensures comfortable application without sticky residue.

  • Australian Made: Proudly supporting local manufacturing since 1956..
name: Bite Relief Repellent Antiseptic Bite Protection Insect Repellent Spray

description: RID REPELLENT AEROSOL TROPIC
long_description:
RID's highly effective Tropical Antiseptic Bite Protection not only repels disease-carrying mosquitoes but also provides comprehensive protection against their bites, enhancing your overall safety.

Over 40% of Aussies use mosquito bites as a cue to apply repellent. Unlike conventional repellents, RID antiseptic bite protection shields against new bites in addition to easing skin irritations and helping prevent infections from previous bites.

8 HOURS
Our superior formula provides longer-lasting protection using less DEET than other brands.

REPELS & PROTECTS
Experience the perfect blend of protection and care with RID's Antiseptic Bite Protection. It repels insects to prevent bites and helps disinfect prior bites, reducing the risk of infection.

AUSTRALIAN MADE
Proudly Aussie made since 1956. Purchasing Australian-made and owned products supports the local economy, sustains jobs, and promotes quality and sustainability.

  • Non-greasy

  • Lightly Scented.

  • Aussie Owned and Made since 1956.

long_description:
Need Protein? Pack some Oomph into your day with Dairy Farmers Protein Smoothies.

Dairy Farmers Chocolate Protein Smoothie is packed with 30g of protein, prebiotics and has no added sugar.

Dairy Farmers Chocolate Protein Smoothie is a delicious, protein-packed on-the-go option for when you're tackling the morning rush, after a workout, to get you through till the next meal and everything in between.

Dairy Farmers Protein Smoothies come in a convenient 400ml bottle to keep you going through the day and offer a range of flavours that taste just like real smoothies with no added sugar. Available in Chocolate, Banana Honey, Mixed Berry, Mango and Vanilla flavours.

5-star health rating. 

Elevate your every day with Dairy Farmers Protein Chocolate Smoothie + Prebiotics, containing:

  • 30g of protein - Aids in building muscle and muscle repair

  • Prebiotics - Supports a healthy gut and digestive health

  • No sugar added - The delicious taste you want, without the added sugar

  • Great tasting flavour - A creamy blend that tastes like real smoothies


Need Protein? Pack some Oomph.
Pick up a Dairy Farmers Chocolate Protein Smoothie today!

* As part of a balanced diet, prebiotics support gut health by increasing the number of good bugs in the gut

  • Prebiotics - Supports a healthy gut and digestive health

  • No sugar added - The delicious taste you want, without the added sugar

long_description:
A whole protein provides all nine essential amino acids which your body needs but cant produce on its own, so it must be supplied daily from food.

Protein is essential for the building and recovery of muscle tissue and organs. Research has also shown that eating a protein-rich breakfast can help stimulate and sustain a feeling of fullness and set the tone for your day.

Loaded with real cocoa for natural chocolate goodness.

High protein
High calcium
Fresh milk
Low fat
Low lactose
No powders or soy

For our full range of products & more, visit our website www.rokebynutrition.com.au and follow us @rokebynutrition

Need Protein? Pack some Oomph into your day with Dairy Farmers Protein Smoothies.

Dairy Farmers Banana Honey Protein Smoothie is packed with 30g of protein, prebiotics and has no added sugar.

Dairy Farmers Banana Honey Protein Smoothie is a delicious, protein-packed on-the-go option for when you're tackling the morning rush, after a workout, to get you through till the next meal and everything in between.

Dairy Farmers Protein Smoothies come in a convenient 400ml bottle to keep you going through the day and offer a range of flavours that taste just like real smoothies with no added sugar. Available in Chocolate, Banana Honey, Mixed Berry, Mango and Vanilla flavours.

5-star health rating. 

Elevate your every day with Dairy Farmers Protein Banana Honey Smoothie + Prebiotics, containing:

  • 30g of protein - Aids in building muscle and muscle repair

  • Prebiotics - Supports a healthy gut and digestive health

  • No sugar added - The delicious taste you want, without the added sugar

  • Great tasting flavour - A creamy blend that tastes like real smoothies


Need Protein? Pack some Oomph.
Pick up a Dairy Farmers Banana Honey Protein Smoothie today!

* As part of a balanced diet, prebiotics support gut health by increasing the number of good bugs in the gut

long_description:
Made with Australian milk and real coffee. When tough calls, it's a Farmers Union Iced Coffee or It's nothing.

Farmers Union Iced Coffee is South Australia's iconic much loved beverage for over 40 years. Its range includes iconic Farmers Union original iced coffee, strong iced coffee, no sugar added iced coffee, lactose free iced coffee and protein iced coffee. Made with reduced fat Australian milk and real coffee, It's a Farmers Union Iced Coffee or It's nothing.

Contains 50% less fat than a 3.4g fat per 100ml flavoured milk.

Delicious flavour from real coffee coupled with the wholesome goodness of milk.

Proudly Australian owned, made and loved. 

4 health star rating. 

Contains 50% less fat vs regular fat regular milk with 3.4% fat

^600ml of this product has 1.4 times the caffeine that's in a 250ml cup of instant coffee, which has 80mg of caffeine. 

The Farmers Union Iced Coffee range includes the iconic original iced coffee, strong iced coffee, no sugar added iced coffee and lactose free iced coffee - there's is a delicious option for every iced coffee lover!

  • Delicious iconic coffee flavour

  • With the wholesome goodness of milk with 8 essential nutrients

  • Reduced fat milk

  • Perfect as a morning or afternoon pick me up

  • Farmers Union Iced Coffee is South Australia's iconic much loved beverage for over 40 years

  • FUIC is available in 300ml, 500mL, 600ml, 750ml & 2 litre packs.

  • Made in Australia from at least 99% Australian ingredients..

long_description:
A 'whole protein' provides all nine essential amino acids which your body needs but can't produce on its own, so it must be supplied daily from food.

Protein is essential for the building and recovery of muscle tissue and organs. Research has also shown that eating a protein-rich breakfast can help stimulate and sustain a feeling of fullness and set the tone for your day.

A classic banana smoothie with a warming drop of honey and sprinkle of cinnamon.

High protein

High calcium

Fresh milk

Low fat

Low lactose

No powders or soy

For our full range of products & more, visit our website www.rokebyfarms.com.au and follow us @rokebyfarms

description: DAIRY FARMERS PROTEIN SMOOTHIE MIXED BERRY 400ML
ingredients: REDUCED FAT MILK, MILK SOLIDS, PREBIOTIC FIBRE (MILK), MIXED BERRY POWDER (0.4%) (STRAWBERRY, RASPBERRY), NATURAL FLAVOURS, SWEETENERS (950, 951), COLOUR (120).
long_description:
Need Protein? Pack some Oomph into your day with Dairy Farmers Protein Smoothies.

Dairy Farmers Mixed Berry Protein Smoothie is packed with 30g of protein, prebiotics and has no added sugar.

Dairy Farmers Mixed Berry Protein Smoothie is a delicious, protein-packed on-the-go option for when you're tackling the morning rush, after a workout, to get you through till the next meal and everything in between.

Dairy Farmers Protein Smoothies come in a convenient 400ml bottle to keep you going through the day and offer a range of flavours that taste just like real smoothies with no added sugar. Available in Chocolate, Banana Honey, Mixed Berry, Mango and Vanilla flavours.

5-star health rating. 

Elevate your every day with Dairy Farmers Protein Mixed Berry Smoothie + Prebiotics, containing:

  • 30g of protein - Aids in building muscle and muscle repair

  • Prebiotics - Supports a healthy gut and digestive health

  • No sugar added - The delicious taste you want, without the added sugar

  • Great tasting flavour - A creamy blend that tastes like real smoothies


Need Protein? Pack some Oomph.
Pick up a Dairy Farmers Mixed Berry Protein Smoothie today!

* As part of a balanced diet, prebiotics support gut health by increasing the number of good bugs in the gut
^ As part of a balanced diet

  • 30g of protein - Aids in building muscle and muscle repair

  • Prebiotics - Supports a healthy gut and digestive health

  • No sugar added - The delicious taste you want, without the added sugar

  • Great tasting flavour - A creamy blend that tastes like real smoothies

  • High quality

  • Nutritious and delicious milk

description: THE COMPLETE DAIRY HIGH PROTEIN FULL CREAM MILK 1L
ingredients: Filtered Milk.
long_description:
Our cold filtration process naturally increases whole protein and reduces lactose to create a nutritious and delicious milk. Complete Dairy does not contain any powders so you can enjoy the taste and goodness of real milk. 

Loaded with 15g of natural protein in every 250 mL cup, Complete Dairy helps keep you feeling fuller for longer* and is great for muscle recovery and bone health as part of a balanced diet. Complete Dairy is a natural fit to help you reach your health and fitness goals. 

4.5 Health Star Rating. 

Complete Diary Milk is proudly Australian owned, made and loved.

^Contains 70% more protein and 25% less lactose vs regular full cream milk with 3.4% protein and 4.4% lactose.

*Compared to low protein foods
  • High Protein

  • 70% higher in protein

  • 25% lower in Lactose

  • Healthy Milk

  • Fresh milk

  • Full Cream milk.

description: COLES FULL CREAM MILK 600ML
ingredients: INGREDIENTSHomogenised and Pasteurised Full Cream Milk
long_description: Coles Australian Dairy Full Cream Milk, 600mL carton.  The hard work and dedicated spirit of dairy farmers is embedded in the fabric of our country. That's why Coles is proud to directly partner with dairy farmers in New South Wales and Victoria, offering longer term agreements and helping farmers better plan for their future. We know each and every farmer we source our milk from and that's what makes us better together. The fresh, creamy goodness of milk is a source of protein and is rich in calcium for healthy teeth and bones. Enjoy the nourishment of Coles milk every day.

description: PAULS ZYMIL LACTOSE FREE SKIM MILK 1L
ingredients: Skim milk, enzyme (lactase).
long_description:
At Pauls, we love dairy. We're pretty passionate about making great tasting products packed with real dairy goodness. We put that devotion into every Pauls milk, cream, custard and yoghurt we make. Milk is a natural source of protein, vitamins and minerals essential for good health. Rich in calcium, Pauls Zymil is simply milk which is easy to digest (As part of a healthy and varied diet, consuming Zymil instead of regular milk helps ease digestion in those who are sensitive to lactose). Plus Pauls Zymil is lactose free and made from real milk so it has all of the natural goodness of regular milk. Lactose free, easy to digest and rich in calcium.
  • Skim milk

  • Lactose free

  • Easy to digest

  • Good source of calcium

  • Real milk, lactose free

description: THE COMPLETE DAIRY HIGH PROTEIN LIGHT MILK 1LITRE
ingredients: Filtered Low Fat Milk.
long_description:
Our cold filtration process naturally increases whole protein to create a nutritious and delicious milk. Complete Dairy does not contain any powders so you can enjoy the taste and goodness of real milk. 

5 Health Star Rating. 

Loaded with 15g of natural protein in every 250 mL cup, Complete Dairy helps keep you feeling fuller for longer* and is great for muscle recovery and bone health as part of a balanced diet. Complete Dairy is a natural fit to help you reach your health and fitness goals. 

Complete Diary Milk is proudly Australian owned, made and loved. 

^Contains 70% more protein and 55% less fat than a regular full cream milk with 3.4g protein and 3.4g fat per 100mL.

*Compared to low protein foods
  • 15g protein per serve

  • 70% higher in protein

  • 55% less fat

long_description:
This full cream milk comes from 100% Australian cows and is a great lactose free option. As the number 1 producer of of A1 protein free milk in Australia, our purpose is to pioneer the future of dairy for good.


For more information on the a2 Milk difference visit www.a2milk.com.au
  • This delicious and creamy fresh milk contains just 3.5g of fat per 100mL

  • Lactose Free Milk is easy to digest for people with intolerance or sensitivity to lactose**a2 Milk Lactose Freemay be easy to digestcompared to ordinarymilk for some peoplewho are sensitive tolactose, when consumedas part of a healthy,varied diet.

  • Naturally all A2-type beta-casein protein type, and no A1Some people may be sensitive to a protein called A1 beta-casein commonly found in milk.

  • The perfect milk for all occasions! Use a2 Milk in tea and coffee, baking, cooking, with cereal, with cookies, or simply enjoy on its own.

  • a2 Milk has been proudly partnering with Landcare Australia since 2017 to support our farmers with initiatives to protect, enhance and restore the natural environment

  • Good source of calcium.

  • The only naturally A1 protein free milk that is also lactose free!.

description: DAIRY FARMERS HIGH PROTEIN MILK 2L
ingredients: Filtered Milk.
long_description:
Dairy Farmers High Protein Full Cream Milk 2L packs a serious hit of Oomph with 18g of high-quality dairy protein per 300mL serve - that's 70% more protein* than regular Dairy Farmers Full Cream Milk. It's the perfect choice for those looking to support muscle growth and maintenance^.

Crafted from Australian milk, this full cream option has a rich, creamy taste, while delivering essential nutrients like calcium, to help keep bones strong.

Whether you're adding it to your morning coffee, blending it into a post-workout smoothie, or pouring it over cereal, Dairy Farmers High Protein Full Cream White Milk makes it easy to boost your protein - no extra steps required. Just swap it for your regular milk and enjoy!

Proudly Aussie-owned, every bottle supports our passionate dairy farming communities and is packaged with a recyclable, easy-pour design.

*Dairy Farmers High Protein Milk contains 70% more protein (6g/100mL) compared to regular Dairy Farmers Full Cream milk, which has 3.4g of protein per 100mL

^compared to low or no protein food or drinks, as part of a balanced diet

  • 18g of high-quality dairy protein per 300mL serve

  • 70% more protein than regular Dairy Farmers Full Cream Milk *

  • Rich, creamy taste Australians love

  • High in calcium for strong bones

  • Great for smoothies, cereal, coffee, and cooking

  • Made from Australian milk.

  • Proudly Aussie-owned.

description: PURA LACTOSE FREE  FULL CREAM 2L
ingredients: Milk, enzyme (lactase).
long_description:
Rich and creamy PURA Lactose Free Full Cream milk provides the nutritional goodness of milk but without the lactose, making it easier to digest^ for the whole family. 

It naturally contains 8 essential nutrients to support a healthy mind and body: 

  • Protein - for muscle growth and repair 
  • Calcium and phosphorous - for strong bones and teeth 
  • Iodine and vitamin B5 - for healthy brain and cognitive function 
  • Potassium - for muscle function and hydration 
  • Vitamin B2 and B12 - for energy maintenance and immune support 

    Consume as part of a varied diet.

    4 health star rating. 

    Proudly Australian owned and supporting local Australian dairy farming communities, choose high quality, nutritious and delicious milk from PURA.

    ^Consuming lactose free milk instead of regular milk is easier to digest for those who are sensitive to lactose, as part of a balanced diet. 
  • PURA is proudly Australian owned

  • PURA supports Australian farmers

  • Lactose Free

  • Full cream milk

  • Easier to digest for those with lactose intolerance.

description: HUNT & BREW EXTRA CREAMY MILK 1L
ingredients: Homogenised and Pasteurised Full Cream Cow's Milk.
long_description:
Hunt and Brew is here to do dairy better.
We know that nothing beats the taste of fresh milk.
We have hunted the globe and found premium quality, fresh milk from Margaret River and the surrounding South West region of Western Australia.

Enjoy our Extra Creamy milk with 4.2% fat! Richer, creamier and fuller-tasting milk that's perfect for your at-home coffee or dairy occasion.
Our bottles are made from 100% recycled Australian plastic. Close the loop & Recycle me again.

description: A2 LACTOSE FREE FULL CREAM MILK 3L
ingredients: Milk, Enzyme (Lactase).
long_description:
This full cream milk comes from 100% Australian cows and is a great lactose free option. As the number 1 producer of A1 protein free milk in Australia, our purpose is to pioneer the future of dairy for good.

For more information on the a2 Milk difference visit www.a2milk.com.au
  • This delicious and creamy fresh milk contains just 3.5g of fat per 100mL

  • Lactose Free Milk is easy to digest for people with intolerance or sensitivity to lactose**a2 Milk Lactose Freemay be easy to digestcompared to ordinarymilk for some peoplewho are sensitive tolactose, when consumedas part of a healthy,varied diet.

  • Naturally all A2-type beta-casein protein type, and no A1Some people may be sensitive to a protein called A1 beta-casein commonly found in milk.

  • The perfect milk for all occasions! Use a2 Milk in tea and coffee, baking, cooking, with cereal, with cookies, or simply enjoy on its own.

  • a2 Milk has been proudly partnering with Landcare Australia since 2017 to support our farmers with initiatives to protect, enhance and restore the natural environment

  • Good source of calcium.

  • The only naturally A1 protein free milk that is also lactose free!.

description: DAIRY FARMERS HEART ACTIVE MILK 1L
ingredients: Low Fat Milk, Plant Sterol Esters (Plant Sterols 0.32%) (contains Soy), Emulsifier (471).
long_description:
Proudly Australian owned, made & loved.

HeartActive milk tastes delicious, making it the simple and easy way to help manage your cholesterol. Good news for your body, great news for your tastebuds.

Enjoy HeartActive milk on your cereal, in tea and coffee, in a delicious fruit smoothie or in cooking. 

5 health star rating. 

Proud supporters of our Australian dairy farming communities for over 120 years, choose high quality, nutritious and delicious milk from Dairy Farmers.

Studies show that consuming milk with plant sterols every day, like HeartActive, can reduce LDL cholesterol after a minimum of three weeks. The highest study reported an average reduction of greater than 10%, and the overall reduction across these studies was 8.53%. Results may vary depending on personal circumstances. For best results, enjoy 2g of plant sterols (2-3 serves of HeartActive milk), as part of a healthy diet, low in saturated fat. More than 3 serves a day provides no additional health benefits. For children under the age of five, pregnant or lactating women and people taking cholesterol-lowering medication, doctor's advice should be sought before using HeartActive, due to their special dietary needs.
  • Reduces Cholesterol by up to 10%

  • 99% fat free milk

  • Fresh Australian milk from Australian farmers

  • Rich in calcium

  • Natural source of protein

  • High quality, nutritious and delicious milk.

  • Plant sterols.
